scenario: CLI that customers complain is confusing — flags inconsistent, errors unclear, --help unhelpful
when_to_pick: You ship a CLI and want a structured pass on the developer's command-line experience

scenario: SDK pre-release — want to catch the things first-time integrators will hit before launch
when_to_pick: Pre-launch readiness check on an SDK or client library

scenario: Customer reported a confusing error message that wasted hours; want to know if the class of problem is widespread
when_to_pick: A specific error-message incident triggered the request; you want the surface-wide pattern

scenario: Designing a new SDK from scratch — want to lock the public shape before code is written
when_to_pick: Pre-implementation design check; you want heuristics applied to the shape, not the code

scenario: Pre-launch hardening pass across docs, errors, CLI, examples — broad scan for the things that look fine but won't survive contact
when_to_pick: Final pre-ship sweep across every DX surface
